title: Flekguila
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Flekguilas''' were sea animals. They were highly valued in galactic gastronomy because of their delicious taste. Many cooks believed that it was better to kill the flekguilas just a few seconds before cooking them.

==Appearances==
*[[Star Wars: Shadows of the Empire (novel)|''Star Wars: Shadows of the Empire'' novel]]
